name: McDermott International, Inc.
description: McDermott International, Ltd is a premier, fully integrated provider of engineering, procurement, construction, and installation (EPCI) and technology solutions to the global energy industry. Operating in over 54 countries, the company delivers complex infrastructure projects, ranging from offshore oil and gas facilities to sustainable energy solutions. With a vast fleet of specialty marine construction vessels and a global network of fabrication facilities, McDermott leverages its technical expertise and project management capabilities to help customers responsibly harness and transform energy resources while maintaining rigorous international standards for safety and quality.
